Sports Scene

Copied

A total of 20 events will produce gold medals on Sunday at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics. The most eye-catching contest will undoubtedly be the men's 100-meter final at the Stade de France at 21:50 (GMT+2).

Before the top speed race, the following events also deserve extra attention:

In tennis, 24-time Grand Slam winner Novak Djokovic of Serbia will play against Carlos Alcaraz of Spain for the men's singles gold medal at Roland Garros with the full day's schedule in the sport getting underway at 12:00 (GMT+2).

Fan Zhendong of China will meet Truls Moregardh of Sweden for the men's singles table tennis title at South Paris Arena 4 at 14:30 (GMT+2). Moregardh knocked out Fan's compatriot, World No. 1 Wang Chuqin, in the round of 32.

The artistic gymnastics men's rings final will take place at the Bercy Arena at 15:00 (GMT+2).
